name: STM32H503 UFQFP N48
description: Generated from the STM32H503 alternate-function workbook and STM32H503EB datasheet for STM32H503 UFQFP N48. This definition models the UFQFP N48 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32H503 devices pair an Arm Cortex-M33 core with up to 128 Kbytes of flash and compact mixed-signal peripherals for entry high-performance designs. This package definition exposes 27 peripheral blocks covering 3 timers, 2 low-power timers, 4 serial ports, 3 SPI controllers, 3 I2S interfaces, 2 I2C controllers, 1 FDCAN controller, 1 ADC instance, a dual-channel DAC, 1 on-chip operational amplifier, 1 ultra-low-power comparator, and 1 USB interface.

peripherals.label: ADC1
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 10 analog input channels and differential INP/INN signal pairs.

peripherals.label: COMP1
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a comparator output.

peripherals.label: CRS
peripherals.description: CRS peripheral with 1 configurable signal.

peripherals.label: DAC1
peripherals.description: Digital-to-analog converter with 2 analog output channels.

peripherals.label: FDCAN1
peripherals.description: Flexible data-rate CAN interface with TT-FDCAN support with TX and RX signals.

peripherals.label: I2C1
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL, SDA, and SMBA signals.

peripherals.label: I2C2
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL, SDA, and SMBA signals.

peripherals.label: I2S1
peripherals.description: I2S digital audio interface with MCK, CK, and WS signals.

peripherals.label: I2S2
peripherals.description: I2S digital audio interface with MCK, CK, and WS signals.

peripherals.label: I2S3
peripherals.description: I2S digital audio interface with MCK, CK, and WS signals.

peripherals.label: LPTIM1
peripherals.description: Low-power timer with IN1, IN2, and ETR signals.

peripherals.label: LPTIM2
peripherals.description: Low-power timer with IN1, IN2, and ETR signals.

peripherals.label: LPUART1
peripherals.description: UART serial interface with TX, RX, CTS, and RTS signals.

peripherals.label: OPAMP1
peripherals.description: On-chip operational amplifier with a positive input, a negative input, and an analog output.

peripherals.label: OSC32
peripherals.description: Low-speed 32.768 kHz oscillator interface with input and output pins.

peripherals.label: PVD
peripherals.description: PVD peripheral with 1 configurable signal.

peripherals.label: RTC
peripherals.description: Real-time clock interface.

peripherals.label: SPI1
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals.

peripherals.label: SPI2
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals.

peripherals.label: SPI3
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals.

peripherals.label: TIM1
peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1, CH2, CH3, and CH4, complementary outputs, a break input, and an external trigger input.

peripherals.label: TIM2
peripherals.description: General-purpose timer with capture/compare channels CH1, CH2, CH3, and CH4 and an external trigger input.

peripherals.label: TIM3
peripherals.description: General-purpose timer with capture/compare channels CH1, CH2, CH3, and CH4 and an external trigger input.

peripherals.description: USART serial interface with synchronous clock support with TX, RX, CTS, RTS, and CK signals.

peripherals.description: USART serial interface with synchronous clock support with TX, RX, CTS, RTS, and CK signals.

peripherals.label: USART3
peripherals.description: USART serial interface with synchronous clock support with TX, RX, CTS, RTS, and CK signals.
